calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Tim Flaherty, Esq. for Plaintiffs: John H. DeGregori as Trustee of The Ruby Jane Byars Trust, UAD April 9, 1992, et al.
John H. DeGregori, Thomas McClure and Charles Oushani, are present.
Gregory Rocca, Esq. for Defendants: David A. Lorentz; Kathleen M. Lorentz; are present and on behalve of Paul D. Lorentz; Thomas A. Lorentz; Bryan Lorentz and Christopher Lorentz.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows: Defendants to purchase the property known as 101 Lunado Way, San Francisco, in the amount of 1 million dollars, and back rents from Mar. 1, 2006 to the closed of escrow date of Feb. 19, 2006 in total of $22,900.00, per diem of $65.83.
Defendants will obtained financing of the purchase by Jan. 19, 2006 or to closed by Feb. 19, 2006, or stipulated for Judgment to be entered after Feb. 19, 2006.
Parties to bear own fees and costs, security deposit to Plaintiff.
Parties will signed the stipulated agreement and terms of sale transaction when reduced to writting.
All understand and agreed to terms.
Matter is deemed settled, trail date vacated.
